title: Fix SQL Query to Extract Unique Product Categories

statement.markdown: Given a table `products` with columns `id`, `name`, and `category`, write a SQL query that extracts unique product categories. The query should return the category name and a count of products in each category.
statement.outputFormat: Unique product categories with product count
statement.notes: The query should handle duplicate categories correctly.

constraints.description: Number of rows in the table

examples.explanation: The query should return unique categories with product count

hints.text: Use the `GROUP BY` clause to group products by category
